Take a look into your company's data

View Liveboard Ask Spotter

ThoughtSpot Embedded Analytics

TSE transforms how companies share data and insights with their customers, partners, and teams. By embedding powerful, AI-driven analytics directly into your applications or customer portals, you can deliver interactive, self-service data experiences that go far beyond traditional dashboards. Users can easily explore information, ask questions in natural language, and uncover meaningful insights in real time without relying on technical teams. The result is a smarter, more engaging product experience that drives transparency, builds trust, and empowers every user to make confident, data-backed decisions.

How to use this Portal

chatbot.welcomeMessage: Hello! I'm your AI assistant. What would you like to know about your data?
